title: matricaria inodora subsp. maritima
intro: Matricaria inodora subsp. maritima is a subspecies of Matricaria inodora, commonly known as a coastal or sea chamomile, and is a type of flowering plant in the asteraceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and calming effects. The health benefits of Matricaria inodora subsp. maritima include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Matricaria inodora subsp. maritima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical applications, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal effects.
